name: ARGUS Enterprise CRE Valuation API
what_it_does: ARGUS Enterprise (Altus Group) REST API for commercial real estate valuation and asset management platform. Enables AI agents to manage property cash flow and discounted cash flow (DCF) model data retrieval for asset valuation, handle lease abstract and rent roll data management for portfolio analytics, access property income and expense projection data for financial modeling, retrieve portfolio valuation and appraisal report data for investment management, manage asset performance benchmarking and comparable sales data analysis, handle scenario analysis and sensitivity testing data for investment decision support, access capital expenditure planning and budget variance data for asset management, retrieve loan covenant testing and debt service coverage data for CRE finance, manage fund-level aggregation and investor reporting data, and integrate valuation data with accounting, investor portal, and portfolio management systems.
use_cases: Retrieving DCF model results from CRE valuation automation agents
Analyzing rent roll data from portfolio management agents
Monitoring loan covenant compliance from CRE finance agents
Aggregating fund performance from investor reporting agents
not_for: Residential real estate valuation without commercial property and DCF focus
Simple property listing without financial modeling and investment analytics
Consumer real estate without institutional CRE investment management
best_when: A CRE investor, asset manager, or appraisal firm using ARGUS Enterprise wants AI agents to automate valuation data retrieval, portfolio analytics, investor reporting, and loan covenant monitoring.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: ARGUS valuation models are used for investment decisions, lending, and appraisal — automated model output without certified appraiser review can create liability. DCF model assumptions (cap rates, vacancy) require market expert validation; automated assumption updates without review create valuation errors. Loan covenant testing results require CRE finance professional review before lender reporting.

auth.notes: ARGUS Enterprise uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Per-organization credentials. Documentation via Altus Group developer resources. No webhooks. REST API with JSON. Toronto, Ontario HQ (Altus Group). ARGUS Software founded 1982, acquired by Altus Group. Industry standard for CRE DCF valuation. ARGUS Cloud available alongside desktop.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per user and asset count; ARGUS Cloud vs. desktop pricing
pricing.notes: Toronto, Ontario. Altus Group (public, AIF TSX). ARGUS Software founded 1982, acquired by Altus Group. CRE valuation industry standard globally. 7,000+ firms in 60+ countries. Used by institutional investors, REITs, lenders, and appraisers. ARGUS Enterprise is successor to ARGUS DCF. Competes with Dyna-Soft for CRE valuation software.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; computation-heavy operations have longer latency

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: ARGUS valuation output is used for investment and lending decisions; automated valuation without certified appraiser review creates liability
DCF computation latency — complex property cash flow recalculation is compute-intensive; API operations that trigger model recalculation may have 5-30 second latency
Desktop vs. cloud ARGUS — ARGUS Enterprise has both desktop and cloud versions; API availability and feature parity differ; verify cloud API coverage for your use case
Model assumption sensitivity — cap rate, discount rate, and vacancy assumption changes have significant valuation impact; never automate assumption updates without market expert review
Lease abstract accuracy — rent roll and lease data quality drives valuation accuracy; validate lease abstraction data before automated model inputs
No webhooks — polling required for model recalculation completion; long-running computations require polling with appropriate timeout handling
agent_readiness.security_notes: CRE valuation and asset management. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Property valuation and investment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: CRE valuation. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Property valuation and investment data.
